text:
level status source variable 
from DE identifies five levels of care: hospital, inpatient psychiatric facility, nursing facility, 
intermediate care facility, or other type of facility. Each of these levels is included in MMLEADS. In 
addition, the MDCD_CARE_LEVEL_MOS variable is the total count of months during the year when any 
of these levels of care was indicated. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
